steps: Navigate campaign map to Army Camp
Verify existing-save migration shows headquarters staff box with empty assignments
Reset campaign and verify initial staff assignments
Change quartermaster staff officer from Weber to Keller
Navigate to Deployment and verify deployment slot plus headquarters ledger
Start battle and verify headquarters command-capacity and reserve-readiness effects on BattleUnit cards
